overall.description: A nighttime walk through a futuristic urban commercial district in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring wet streets, palm trees, neon signage, and an underpass. The camera follows a path from a busy sidewalk through a graffiti-covered tunnel to a billboard-lined road.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet commercial street at night with palm trees and futuristic buildings. The camera walks forward along the sidewalk, approaching a green-haired character who passes by closely. The environment features neon signage and reflective wet pavement under overcast night skies.

events.description: crossing the street from sidewalk to sidewalk near the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the street while moving toward the tunnel underpass ahead

concrete wall with colorful graffiti tags and murals

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the street and approaches a large concrete overpass with a tunnel entrance. The scene transitions from the commercial storefronts to a more industrial area with graffiti-covered walls. Street lights illuminate the wet asphalt as the camera moves toward the underpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete underpass tunnel with graffiti walls

exiting the tunnel, returning to open sky and outdoor lighting

linear fluorescent lights mounted on the tunnel ceiling casting greenish light

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow concrete underpass tunnel illuminated by artificial green-tinted lights. The walls are covered in colorful graffiti and murals. After walking through the enclosed space, the camera emerges back into the open air, transitioning from the artificial tunnel lighting to the night sky.

events.description: approaching a character in a red shirt walking toward the camera

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past illuminated billboards, approaching a pedestrian

notable_agents.action: character in red shirt and jeans walking toward the camera along the billboard-lined path

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement for Arasaka corporation showing a soldier figure
colorful advertisement displaying food items with 'The Big Eat Show' text
tall street lamp illuminating the sidewalk with warm light

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the scene opens to a roadside lined with large illuminated billboards including an Arasaka advertisement and food promotions. The camera walks along the wet sidewalk under street lights, approaching a character in a red shirt walking in the opposite direction. Palm trees and distant buildings are visible against the dark cloudy sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-lit commercial street through a gritty industrial underpass and back into an open urban corridor. It begins by walking along a wet sidewalk past futuristic buildings and palm trees, passing a green-haired character under the glow of reflective neon signage. As the camera crosses the street, the commercial storefronts give way to a more industrial atmosphere, leading the viewer toward a concrete overpass with graffiti-covered walls. The scene then shifts into a narrow underpass illuminated by artificial green-tinted lights and murals before emerging from the enclosed space back into the open night air. Finally, the environment opens up to a roadside lined with massive illuminated billboards and palm trees, where the camera continues along the wet pavement toward a character in a red shirt.
